title: Sunrun vs Tesla Solar
description: Compare two large solar providers by ownership options, equipment ecosystem, service model, and quote details.
winnerSummary: The better choice depends on local service quality, quote terms, equipment fit, and financing preference.
bestForA: Homeowners comparing lease, PPA, and purchase options.
bestForB: Homeowners interested in Tesla panels, Solar Roof, or Powerwall.
costConsiderations: Compare total installed cost, financing, warranties, production guarantees, battery integration, and service timelines.

faqs.question: Should I get multiple quotes?
faqs.answer: Yes. Compare at least three installer quotes before signing a solar contract.

sources: U.S. Department of Energy solar financing resources
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau financing education
EnergySage solar equipment and financing education
